---
title: "Build with Data. Be a Positive Force."
description: "Matteo's Lab documents open research, data stories and useful tools designed to help people, communities and businesses make better decisions."
author: "Matteo Arellano"
lang: en

image: "images/social/matteos-lab-social-card.png"
image-alt: "Mountain and river landscape introducing Matteo's Lab: Build with data, a force for positive change."

open-graph:
  title: "Matteo's Lab | Build with Data"
  description: "Open research, data stories and useful tools for people, communities and businesses."
  image: "images/social/matteos-lab-social-card.png"
  image-width: 1200
  image-height: 630
  site-name: "Matteo's Lab"
  locale: en_US

twitter-card:
  card-style: summary_large_image
  title: "Matteo's Lab | Build with Data"
  description: "Open research, data stories and useful tools for people, communities and businesses."
  image: "images/social/matteos-lab-social-card.png"

page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

<style>
  #title-block-header {
    display: none !important;
  }

  :root {
    --lab-abyss: #021c26;
    --lab-deep: #032b38;
    --lab-ocean: #06495a;
    --lab-lagoon: #14a8bb;
    --lab-cyan: #5bd3e3;
    --lab-reef: #81e2dc;
    --lab-seafoam: #d8f6f1;
    --lab-coral: #f39a7b;
    --lab-sand: #f4ead2;
    --lab-cream: #fbf8ef;
    --lab-white: #ffffff;
    --lab-ink: #0a2b36;
    --lab-muted: #627780;
    --lab-border: rgba(6, 73, 90, 0.15);
  }

  #quarto-content,
  main.content {
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }

  .page-columns {
    display: block !important;
  }

  .lab-home {
    overflow: hidden;
    color: var(--lab-ink);
    background: var(--lab-cream);
  }

  .lab-container {
    width: min(1180px, calc(100% - 2rem));
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .lab-kicker,
  .lab-section__eyebrow {
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     HERO
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-hero {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    background:
      radial-gradient(
        circle at 84% 14%,
        rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.28),
        transparent 27%
      ),
      radial-gradient(
        circle at 76% 75%,
        rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.12),
        transparent 30%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        130deg,
        var(--lab-abyss) 0%,
        var(--lab-deep) 48%,
        var(--lab-ocean) 100%
      );
  }

  .lab-hero::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    opacity: 0.18;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 1px,
        transparent 1px
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 1px,
        transparent 1px
      );
    background-size: 72px 72px;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black, transparent 92%);
  }

  .lab-hero::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: -9rem;
    bottom: -11rem;
    width: 38rem;
    height: 38rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.16);
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 70px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.035),
      0 0 0 140px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.022),
      0 0 0 210px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.014);
  }

  .lab-hero__pattern {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 1;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 42%;
    height: 100%;
    opacity: 0.11;
    pointer-events: none;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        transparent 42%,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) 43%,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) 47%,
        transparent 48%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        45deg,
        transparent 42%,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) 43%,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58) 47%,
        transparent 48%
      );
    background-size: 42px 42px;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(
      to left,
      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9),
      transparent
    );
  }

  .lab-hero__waves {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 1;
    right: -4%;
    bottom: -6rem;
    width: 62%;
    height: 21rem;
    opacity: 0.16;
    border-radius: 50%;
    pointer-events: none;
    background:
      repeating-radial-gradient(
        ellipse at 50% 100%,
        transparent 0 32px,
        rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.7) 33px 35px,
        transparent 36px 60px
      );
    transform: rotate(-4deg);
  }

  .lab-hero__inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
    padding: 6.5rem 0 6rem;
  }

  .lab-hero__copy {
    max-width: 1050px;
  }

  .lab-hero h1 {
    max-width: 1000px;
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    font-size: clamp(3.6rem, 7vw, 7rem);
    line-height: 1.04;
    letter-spacing: -0.055em;
  }

  .lab-hero h1 span {
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
  }

  .lab-hero__intro {
    max-width: 810px;
    margin: 2.75rem 0 0;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    font-size: clamp(1.12rem, 1.8vw, 1.35rem);
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  .lab-actions {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 2.75rem;
  }

  .lab-button {
    display: inline-flex;
    min-height: 54px;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.9rem 1.55rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition:
      transform 160ms ease,
      background 160ms ease,
      border-color 160ms ease;
  }

  .lab-button:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .lab-button--primary {
    color: var(--lab-abyss);
    background: var(--lab-cyan);
  }

  .lab-button--primary:hover {
    color: var(--lab-abyss);
    background: var(--lab-reef);
  }

  .lab-button--secondary {
    color: var(--lab-white);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
  }

  .lab-button--secondary:hover {
    color: var(--lab-white);
    border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  }

  /* ======================================================
     GUIDING PRINCIPLE
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-mission-card {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 2rem;
    padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.24);
    border-radius: 30px;
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        120deg,
        rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1),
        rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.07)
      );
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
  }

  .lab-mission-card::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 320px;
    height: 100%;
    opacity: 0.12;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-reef) 41% 46%,
        transparent 47%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        45deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-cyan) 41% 46%,
        transparent 47%
      );
    background-size: 36px 36px;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, black, transparent);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .lab-mission-card::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: 3rem;
    bottom: -5rem;
    width: 15rem;
    height: 15rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.18);
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 36px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.035),
      0 0 0 72px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.02);
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__header {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1.25rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__icon {
    width: 62px;
    height: 62px;
    flex: 0 0 62px;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.32);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    background: rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.1);
  }

  .lab-mission-card__icon svg {
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    fill: none;
    stroke: currentColor;
    stroke-width: 1.7;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__label {
    margin: 0 0 0.55rem;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.17em;
  }

  .lab-mission-card h2 {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    border: 0 !important;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem);
    line-height: 1.1;
    letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__copy {
    max-width: 980px;
    margin: 0;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76);
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    line-height: 1.85;
  }

  .lab-mission-card__source {
    display: block;
    margin-top: 2rem;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     GENERAL SECTIONS
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-section {
    position: relative;
    padding: 6.5rem 0;
  }

  .lab-section--white {
    background: var(--lab-white);
  }

  .lab-section--cream {
    background: var(--lab-cream);
  }

  .lab-section__intro {
    max-width: 840px;
    margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }

  .lab-section__eyebrow {
    color: var(--lab-ocean);
  }

  .lab-section h2 {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--lab-ink);
    font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 4.8vw, 5.2rem);
    line-height: 1.02;
    letter-spacing: -0.05em;
  }

  .lab-section__intro > p:last-child {
    max-width: 780px;
    margin: 1.5rem 0 0;
    color: var(--lab-muted);
    font-size: 1.16rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  .lab-section-pattern {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    width: 34%;
    height: 100%;
    opacity: 0.035;
    pointer-events: none;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-ocean) 41% 47%,
        transparent 48%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        45deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-ocean) 41% 47%,
        transparent 48%
      );
    background-size: 42px 42px;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(to left, black, transparent);
  }

  /* ======================================================
     PURPOSE CARDS
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-purpose-grid {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1.25rem;
  }

  .lab-purpose-card {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 320px;
    padding: 2.2rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--lab-border);
    border-radius: 26px;
    background: var(--lab-white);
    transition:
      transform 180ms ease,
      box-shadow 180ms ease;
  }

  .lab-purpose-card::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: -2.5rem;
    bottom: -2.5rem;
    width: 9rem;
    height: 9rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.11);
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 25px rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.025),
      0 0 0 50px rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.015);
  }

  .lab-purpose-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(3, 43, 56, 0.1);
  }

  .lab-purpose-card__number {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 4rem;
    color: var(--lab-lagoon);
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
  }

  .lab-purpose-card h3 {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--lab-ink);
    font-size: 1.6rem;
  }

  .lab-purpose-card p {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    margin: 1rem 0 0;
    color: var(--lab-muted);
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     CURRENT PROJECT
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-expedition {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1.15fr 0.85fr;
    min-height: 500px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 34px;
    background: var(--lab-deep);
    box-shadow: 0 28px 75px rgba(3, 43, 56, 0.18);
  }

  .lab-expedition__visual {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 460px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: var(--lab-deep);
  }

  .lab-expedition__image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: block;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
  }

  .lab-expedition__visual::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 1;
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        to top,
        rgba(2, 28, 38, 0.64) 0%,
        rgba(2, 28, 38, 0.04) 52%,
        rgba(2, 28, 38, 0.12) 100%
      );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .lab-expedition__visual::after {
    content: "PACIFIC";
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 2;
    left: 2rem;
    bottom: 1rem;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.17);
    font-size: clamp(4rem, 10vw, 9rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 0.8;
    letter-spacing: -0.07em;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .lab-expedition__content {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 4.2rem);
    overflow: hidden;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    background:
      radial-gradient(
        circle at 100% 0%,
        rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.14),
        transparent 34%
      ),
      var(--lab-deep);
  }

  .lab-expedition__content::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: -4rem;
    bottom: -4rem;
    width: 14rem;
    height: 14rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.14);
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 40px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.025),
      0 0 0 80px rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.014);
  }

  .lab-expedition__number,
  .lab-expedition h3,
  .lab-expedition__content p,
  .lab-expedition__link {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .lab-expedition__number {
    margin: 0 0 1rem;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  }

  .lab-expedition h3 {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 3.8vw, 4rem);
    line-height: 1;
    letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  }

  .lab-expedition__content p {
    margin: 1.5rem 0 0;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.76);
    line-height: 1.75;
  }

  .lab-expedition__link {
    display: inline-flex;
    width: fit-content;
    margin-top: 1.9rem;
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
    font-weight: 800;
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .lab-expedition__link:hover {
    color: var(--lab-white);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     BIGGER PURPOSE
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-values {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    background:
      radial-gradient(
        circle at 12% 20%,
        rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.16),
        transparent 25%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        var(--lab-abyss),
        var(--lab-deep)
      );
  }

  .lab-values::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    opacity: 0.08;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-reef) 41% 46%,
        transparent 47%
      ),
      linear-gradient(
        45deg,
        transparent 40%,
        var(--lab-cyan) 41% 46%,
        transparent 47%
      );
    background-size: 46px 46px;
    mask-image: linear-gradient(
      to right,
      transparent,
      black,
      transparent
    );
  }

  .lab-values::after {
    content: "+";
    position: absolute;
    right: 3%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-52%);
    color: rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.05);
    font-size: 28rem;
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .lab-values__inner {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 0.85fr 1.15fr;
    gap: 5rem;
    align-items: start;
    padding: 7rem 0;
  }

  .lab-values__quote {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--lab-white);
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 5.5vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.04;
    letter-spacing: -0.055em;
  }

  .lab-values__quote span {
    color: var(--lab-cyan);
  }

  .lab-values__copy {
    max-width: 720px;
  }

  .lab-values__copy p {
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.74);
    font-size: 1.12rem;
    line-height: 1.8;
  }

  .lab-values__copy p:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     PRINCIPLES
     ====================================================== */

  .lab-principles {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--lab-border);
    border-radius: 28px;
    background: var(--lab-border);
  }

  .lab-principle {
    position: relative;
    min-height: 330px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 2.75rem 2rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-align: center;
    background:
      radial-gradient(
        circle at 50% 0%,
        rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.09),
        transparent 40%
      ),
      var(--lab-white);
  }

  .lab-principle::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    right: -4rem;
    bottom: -4rem;
    width: 10rem;
    height: 10rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.08);
    border-radius: 50%;
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 25px rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.018),
      0 0 0 50px rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.01);
  }

  .lab-principle__icon {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 78px;
    height: 78px;
    flex: 0 0 78px;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 2.25rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.28);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: var(--lab-ocean);
    background:
      radial-gradient(
        circle,
        rgba(129, 226, 220, 0.22),
        rgba(91, 211, 227, 0.08)
      );
  }

  .lab-principle__icon::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 7px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(20, 168, 187, 0.13);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  .lab-principle__icon svg {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 34px;
    height: 34px;
    display: block;
    fill: none;
    stroke: currentColor;
    stroke-width: 1.65;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }

  .lab-principle h3 {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    margin: 0 0 1rem;
    padding: 0;
    border: 0 !important;
    color: var(--lab-ink);
    font-size: 1.35rem;
    line-height: 1.3;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .lab-principle p {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    max-width: 260px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    color: var(--lab-muted);
    line-height: 1.75;
    text-align: center;
  }

  /* ======================================================
     TABLET
     ====================================================== */

  @media (max-width: 950px) {
    .lab-values__inner,
    .lab-expedition {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .lab-purpose-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .lab-principles {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    .lab-expedition__visual {
      min-height: 360px;
    }

    .lab-hero__pattern {
      width: 60%;
    }
  }

  /* ======================================================
     MOBILE
     ====================================================== */

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .lab-container {
      width: min(100% - 1.25rem, 1180px);
    }

    .lab-hero__inner {
      padding: 4.5rem 0;
    }

    .lab-hero h1 {
      font-size: clamp(3.1rem, 15vw, 4.6rem);
      line-height: 1.02;
    }

    .lab-hero__intro {
      margin-top: 2.25rem;
    }

    .lab-actions {
      flex-direction: column;
      margin-top: 2.25rem;
    }

    .lab-button {
      width: 100%;
    }

    .lab-mission-card {
      margin-top: 2rem;
      padding: 1.75rem;
    }

    .lab-mission-card__header {
      align-items: flex-start;
    }

    .lab-mission-card__icon {
      width: 52px;
      height: 52px;
      flex-basis: 52px;
    }

    .lab-section {
      padding: 4.5rem 0;
    }

    .lab-purpose-card {
      padding: 1.75rem;
    }

    .lab-principles {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .lab-values__inner {
      gap: 2.5rem;
      padding: 5rem 0;
    }

    .lab-expedition__visual {
      min-height: 310px;
    }

    .lab-hero__pattern {
      width: 90%;
      opacity: 0.06;
    }
  }
</style>

```{=html}
<div class="lab-home">

  <section class="lab-hero">

    <div
      class="lab-hero__pattern"
      aria-hidden="true"
    ></div>

    <div
      class="lab-hero__waves"
      aria-hidden="true"
    ></div>

    <div class="lab-container lab-hero__inner">

      <div class="lab-hero__copy">

        <p class="lab-kicker">
          OPEN RESEARCH • DATA STORIES • SOFTWARE • PUBLIC VALUE
        </p>

        <h1>
          Build with data.<br>
          Be a <span>positive force.</span>
        </h1>

        <p class="lab-hero__intro">
          Matteo’s Lab is where I use data, research and technology to build
          tools and stories that help people, communities and businesses
          understand problems, discover opportunities and make better decisions.
        </p>

        <div class="lab-actions">

          <a
            class="lab-button lab-button--primary"
            href="/projects/pacific-dataviz-2026/"
          >
            Explore the Pacific project
          </a>

          <a
            class="lab-button lab-button--secondary"
            href="/about.html"
          >
            About the lab
          </a>

        </div>

      </div>

      <aside class="lab-mission-card">

        <div class="lab-mission-card__content">

          <div class="lab-mission-card__header">

            <div
              class="lab-mission-card__icon"
              aria-hidden="true"
            >
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8"></circle>
                <path d="M12 2v3"></path>
                <path d="M12 19v3"></path>
                <path d="M2 12h3"></path>
                <path d="M19 12h3"></path>
                <path d="m12 7 2 5-2 5-2-5 2-5Z"></path>
              </svg>
            </div>

            <div>

              <p class="lab-mission-card__label">
                THE GUIDING PRINCIPLE
              </p>

              <h2>
                Be a Positive Force.
              </h2>

            </div>

          </div>

          <p class="lab-mission-card__copy">
            I want the work created here to move beyond the screen: helping
            people understand something important, improving how a business
            serves its customers or giving a community a stronger voice.
          </p>

          <span class="lab-mission-card__source">
            A principle from my alma mater
          </span>

        </div>

      </aside>

    </div>

  </section>

  <section class="lab-section lab-section--white">

    <div
      class="lab-section-pattern"
      aria-hidden="true"
    ></div>

    <div class="lab-container">

      <div class="lab-section__intro">

        <p class="lab-section__eyebrow">
          WHY THIS LAB EXISTS
        </p>

        <h2>
          Technology should make life more understandable and more useful.
        </h2>

        <p>
          We have access to more information than ever before. The challenge
          is turning that information into work that helps someone: a clearer
          decision, a better service, a useful tool or a story that deserves
          greater attention.
        </p>

      </div>

      <div class="lab-purpose-grid">

        <article class="lab-purpose-card">

          <span class="lab-purpose-card__number">
            01 • UNDERSTAND
          </span>

          <h3>
            Research real questions
          </h3>

          <p>
            Explore datasets, listen to communities and investigate the
            underlying causes behind problems rather than jumping directly
            to a polished answer.
          </p>

        </article>

        <article class="lab-purpose-card">

          <span class="lab-purpose-card__number">
            02 • BUILD
          </span>

          <h3>
            Create useful tools
          </h3>

          <p>
            Develop visualizations, browser extensions, applications and
            analytical systems that make complex work clearer and easier
            for people to use.
          </p>

        </article>

        <article class="lab-purpose-card">

          <span class="lab-purpose-card__number">
            03 • SHARE
          </span>

          <h3>
            Document the journey
          </h3>

          <p>
            Publish the questions, code, experiments, mistakes and decisions
            behind each project so the work can be understood, challenged
            and improved.
          </p>

        </article>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>

  <section class="lab-section lab-section--cream">

    <div class="lab-container">

      <div class="lab-section__intro">

        <p class="lab-section__eyebrow">
          CURRENT PROJECT
        </p>

        <h2>
          Learning from the Pacific through open data.
        </h2>

        <p>
          My first data competition is also the first complete expedition
          documented inside this lab, from understanding the available
          evidence to building the final visual story.
        </p>

      </div>

      <article class="lab-expedition">

        <div class="lab-expedition__visual">

          <img
            src="/images/home/matteo-arellano-navigating.jpeg"
            alt="Matteo Arellano standing on a boat with mountains and sea in the background"
            class="lab-expedition__image"
          />

        </div>

        <div class="lab-expedition__content">

          <p class="lab-expedition__number">
            PROJECT 001 • JULY 2026
          </p>

          <h3>
            Pacific Dataviz Challenge 2026
          </h3>

          <p>
            I am exploring how open data can reveal meaningful stories about
            climate, communities and public policy across the Pacific.
          </p>

          <p>
            The complete process will live here: research notes, hypotheses,
            data cleaning, code, visual experiments, failures, findings and
            the final submission.
          </p>

          <a
            class="lab-expedition__link"
            href="/projects/pacific-dataviz-2026/"
          >
            Enter the project →
          </a>

        </div>

      </article>

    </div>

  </section>

  <section class="lab-values">

    <div class="lab-container lab-values__inner">

      <div>

        <p class="lab-kicker">
          THE BIGGER PURPOSE
        </p>

        <p class="lab-values__quote">
          More insights.<br>
          Shared benefits.<br>
          <span>Better outcomes.</span>
        </p>

      </div>

      <div class="lab-values__copy">

        <p>
          I have been fortunate to travel to remote places and meet communities
          whose lives are closely connected to farming, fishing and natural
          resources.
        </p>

        <p>
          Seeing pollution, waste and extreme temperatures affect these places
          changed how I think about technology. Data is not only something to
          analyse. It can help us understand what is changing, make problems
          visible and support people who already hold deep knowledge of their
          environment.
        </p>

        <p>
          The same principle applies to businesses and digital products.
          Better measurement and better tools can remove friction, improve
          services and help organisations treat their customers more fairly.
        </p>

        <p>
          This lab is where I connect those worlds: data, technology, business,
          communities and the responsibility to contribute something useful.
        </p>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>

  <section class="lab-section lab-section--white">

    <div class="lab-container">

      <div class="lab-section__intro">

        <p class="lab-section__eyebrow">
          HOW I WANT TO WORK
        </p>

        <h2>
          Four principles behind every project.
        </h2>

      </div>

      <div class="lab-principles">

        <article class="lab-principle">

          <div
            class="lab-principle__icon"
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8"></circle>
              <path d="M12 2v3"></path>
              <path d="M12 19v3"></path>
              <path d="M2 12h3"></path>
              <path d="M19 12h3"></path>
              <path d="m12 7 2 5-2 5-2-5 2-5Z"></path>
            </svg>
          </div>

          <h3>
            Start with curiosity
          </h3>

          <p>
            Ask better questions before choosing the technology or the answer.
          </p>

        </article>

        <article class="lab-principle">

          <div
            class="lab-principle__icon"
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path d="M4 17c2-3 4-4 8-4s6 1 8 4"></path>
              <circle cx="12" cy="8" r="3"></circle>
              <path d="M3 20c3-2 6-3 9-3s6 1 9 3"></path>
            </svg>
          </div>

          <h3>
            Stay close to reality
          </h3>

          <p>
            Understand the people, communities and systems represented by the data.
          </p>

        </article>

        <article class="lab-principle">

          <div
            class="lab-principle__icon"
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle cx="6" cy="12" r="2"></circle>
              <circle cx="18" cy="6" r="2"></circle>
              <circle cx="18" cy="18" r="2"></circle>
              <path d="m8 11 8-4"></path>
              <path d="m8 13 8 4"></path>
            </svg>
          </div>

          <h3>
            Build transparently
          </h3>

          <p>
            Share the process, limitations and reasoning behind the final work.
          </p>

        </article>

        <article class="lab-principle">

          <div
            class="lab-principle__icon"
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <path d="M12 21V10"></path>
              <path d="M12 14c-4 0-7-2-8-6 4 0 7 2 8 6Z"></path>
              <path d="M12 11c4 0 7-2 8-6-4 0-7 2-8 6Z"></path>
              <path d="M7 21h10"></path>
            </svg>
          </div>

          <h3>
            Leave something useful
          </h3>

          <p>
            Create work that improves understanding, decisions or everyday life.
          </p>

        </article>

      </div>

    </div>

  </section>

</div>
```
